# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI
on: [push, pull_request]
jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and Cache Dependencies
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Fetch the entire history to cache all dependencies

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: 14

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Install node_modules and link local packages
        run: npm ci && npm link

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/pyproject.toml', '**/setup.cfg') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Cache environment specific configs
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: ~/.config
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-env-${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}-${{ hashFiles('**/env/*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-env-*

      - name: Install and run tests
        env:
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ env.ENVIRONMENT }}  # Pass the environment variable to the test command
        run: npm run test
